arts.ttl: Saturday's FA Cup preview: Liverpool, Man City and Chelsea in action
arts.sum: Brentford head coach Thomas Frank hopes to soon see the best of Rico Henry again as the defender prepares to make his long-awaited return from injury in Saturday's FA Cup third round tie against Plymouth . "Rico will be involved in the game tomorrow - not only will he be involved, he will start," Frank told a press conference.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Morecambe – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea face League Two side Morecambe this weekend to decide who will progress into the fourth round of the FA Cup. The Blues are currently four games without a win after a testing few weeks. Central defenders Benoit Badiashile and Wesley Fofana are long-term absentees with Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall also expected to miss out. arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Morecambe – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea host fourth-tier Morecame in the FA Cup’s third round on Saturday. The Blues begin their FA Cup campaign as strong favourites against a Shrimps side trying to cling on to their Football League status. Enzo Maresca will hope his side can use the tie to rediscover their form, following a four-game winless run. arts.ttl: Chelsea take drastic action to avoid nightmare Marc Cucurella transfer repeat with four players
arts.sum: Less than five weeks later and Cucurella was starting games for Chelsea at both left-back and right-back because Chilwell had picked up yet another setback. With Chilwell starting the season in the Chelsea team - although more on the wing than as a defender - Cucurella looked free to go.
